title: phyllanthus humbertianus
intro: Phyllanthus humbertianus, also known as Humbert's phyllanthus, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating liver and kidney disorders, and alleviating symptoms of various infections. Phyllanthus humbertianus is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
